zh.West Barsham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可韋斯特 巴爾善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Pepys於大約1505年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親William Pepys42歲，母親Margaret Whiston46歲。她和Thomas Jennison至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Pepys于大约1505年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲William Pepys42岁，母亲Margaret Whiston46岁。她和Thomas Jennison至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Pepys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Old French personal name Pepis. It is a nominative form of Pepon, a French version of Continental Germanic Pipo, and probably related to Old French Pepin. See Peppin . The personal name was extremely rare in medieval England. (ii) relationship name; alternatively it may mean; ‘Philip’s (son/relative/servant)’, from the genitive singular of Middle English * Pip, * Pep, side-forms perhaps of Phip, Phep, pet forms of Middle English Philip, Phelip. Compare Peppin , Phippen .

variants.name: Phippen
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): shortened form of the Anglo-Norman surname Fitzpain ‘son of Pain’ (see Payne ).

English: variant of Phipp with the West Midlands Middle English genitive singular -en instead of the more usual -s, see Phipps . Alternatively, perhaps from the unattested Middle English personal names Phippon or Phippin, which could be Old French pet forms of Philip , though they are not on record.
Irish: perhaps an altered form of Thigpen by association or confusion with the name in (1). The 17th-century Thigpen and Phippen families in NC were apparently related.

variants.name: Pipes
meanings: English: variant of Pipe , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Pepys was born about 1505, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Pepys, was 42 and her mother, Margaret Whiston, was 46. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Thomas Jennison.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Pepys est née environ 1505, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Pepys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whiston, avait 46 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Thomas Jennison.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Pepys um 1505 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pepys 42 und ihre Mutter Margaret Whiston 46. Sie hatte mit Thomas Jennison mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pepys è nata il circa 1505 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Pepys, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margaret Whiston, aveva 46 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Thomas Jennison.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Pepys(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pepys(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Whiston(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Jennison(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pepys nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Pepys, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whiston, tinha 46 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Thomas Jennison.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Pepys родилась около 1505 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Pepys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whiston, 46. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Thomas Jennison.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Pepys nació aproximadamente 1505, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Pepys, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Whiston, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Thomas Jennison.
